```{=html}
<style>
.chiral-waves-mass-gap-animation {
  width: min(100%, 820px);
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.reveal section.chiral-mass-slide .columns {
  gap: 1.05rem;
}

.reveal section.chiral-mass-slide .chiral-mass-text {
  font-size: 0.68em;
  line-height: 1.18;
}

.reveal section.chiral-mass-slide .chiral-mass-text li {
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.reveal section.chiral-mass-slide .chiral-mass-text .math.display {
  margin: 0.22rem 0 0;
  font-size: 1.08em;
}

.chiral-waves-mass-gap-animation svg {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  max-height: 545px;
}

.chiral-waves-mass-gap-animation text {
  font-family: var(--r-main-font, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif);
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.chiral-stage-bg {
  fill: rgba(2, 7, 14, 0.76);
  stroke: rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.24);
  stroke-width: 2;
}

.chiral-axis,
.chiral-zero-line {
  stroke: rgba(246, 251, 255, 0.42);
  stroke-width: 2;
  stroke-linecap: round;
}

.chiral-zero-line {
  stroke-dasharray: 5 9;
  opacity: 0.7;
}

.chiral-axis-label {
  fill: #b8d3e5;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.chiral-plot-label {
  fill: #f6fbff;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.chiral-small-label {
  fill: #b8d3e5;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.chiral-massless-line {
  fill: none;
  stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.44);
  stroke-width: 2.5;
  stroke-dasharray: 8 8;
}

.chiral-massive-positive,
.chiral-massive-negative {
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 4.5;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.55));
}

.chiral-massive-positive {
  stroke: #8ec5ff;
}

.chiral-massive-negative {
  stroke: #ff8a7a;
}

.chiral-gap-line {
  stroke: #ffd166;
  stroke-width: 4;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.62));
}

.chiral-branch-dot-positive {
  fill: #8ec5ff;
  stroke: #f6fbff;
  stroke-width: 2.5;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.8));
}

.chiral-branch-dot-negative {
  fill: #ff8a7a;
  stroke: #f6fbff;
  stroke-width: 2.5;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255, 138, 122, 0.75));
}

.chiral-mode-panel {
  fill: rgba(2, 7, 14, 0.72);
  stroke: rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.2);
  stroke-width: 2;
}

.chiral-mode-title {
  fill: #f6fbff;
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.chiral-mode-formula {
  fill: #ffd166;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.chiral-lane {
  stroke: rgba(246, 251, 255, 0.2);
  stroke-width: 2;
  stroke-linecap: round;
}

.chiral-component-label {
  fill: #b8d3e5;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.chiral-component-wave-r,
.chiral-component-wave-l {
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 4;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.4));
}

.chiral-component-wave-r {
  stroke: #8ec5ff;
}

.chiral-component-wave-l {
  stroke: #ffd166;
}

.chiral-phase-dot-r,
.chiral-phase-dot-l {
  stroke: #f6fbff;
  stroke-width: 2;
}

.chiral-phase-dot-r {
  fill: #8ec5ff;
}

.chiral-phase-dot-l {
  fill: #ffd166;
}
</style>

<div class="chiral-waves-mass-gap-animation" role="img" aria-label="Higgs condensate couples right and left chiral waves, opening a mass gap and producing in-phase and out-of-phase normal modes at rest.">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 820 520">
    <defs>
      <clipPath id="chiral-dispersion-clip">
        <rect x="82" y="48" width="660" height="282"/>
      </clipPath>
    </defs>

    <rect class="chiral-stage-bg" x="12" y="14" width="796" height="492" rx="8"/>

    <g class="chiral-dispersion" data-mass="1">
      <text class="chiral-plot-label" x="38" y="48">frequency spectrum</text>
      <text class="chiral-small-label" x="38" y="72">Higgs condensate opens the gap</text>

      <line class="chiral-axis" x1="82" y1="190" x2="742" y2="190"/>
      <line class="chiral-axis" x1="412" y1="48" x2="412" y2="330"/>
      <line class="chiral-zero-line" x1="82" y1="120" x2="742" y2="120"/>
      <line class="chiral-zero-line" x1="82" y1="260" x2="742" y2="260"/>

      <text class="chiral-axis-label" x="728" y="215">p</text>
      <text class="chiral-axis-label" x="424" y="63">&#969;</text>
      <text class="chiral-small-label" x="424" y="102">+m</text>
      <text class="chiral-small-label" x="424" y="292">-m</text>

      <g clip-path="url(#chiral-dispersion-clip)">
        <path class="chiral-massless-line" data-path="massless-positive"/>
        <path class="chiral-massless-line" data-path="massless-negative"/>
        <path class="chiral-massive-positive" data-path="massive-positive"/>
        <path class="chiral-massive-negative" data-path="massive-negative"/>
        <circle class="chiral-branch-dot-positive" data-dot="positive" cx="412" cy="120" r="8"/>
        <circle class="chiral-branch-dot-negative" data-dot="negative" cx="412" cy="260" r="8"/>
      </g>

      <line class="chiral-gap-line" x1="412" y1="120" x2="412" y2="260"/>
      <text class="chiral-mode-formula" x="430" y="195">2m</text>
      <text class="chiral-small-label" x="622" y="88">&#969; = +&#8730;(p&#178;+m&#178;)</text>
      <text class="chiral-small-label" x="620" y="306">&#969; = -&#8730;(p&#178;+m&#178;)</text>
      <text class="chiral-small-label" x="118" y="92">&#969; = +p</text>
      <text class="chiral-small-label" x="112" y="306">&#969; = -p</text>

    </g>

    <g class="chiral-mode" data-mode="plus" data-phase-sign="1">
      <rect class="chiral-mode-panel" x="40" y="360" width="348" height="112" rx="8"/>
      <text class="chiral-mode-title" x="60" y="388">in phase at p = 0</text>
      <text class="chiral-mode-formula" x="250" y="388">&#936;&#8330; = (R+L)/&#8730;2</text>
      <line class="chiral-lane" x1="100" y1="418" x2="352" y2="418"/>
      <line class="chiral-lane" x1="100" y1="450" x2="352" y2="450"/>
      <text class="chiral-component-label" x="66" y="423">R</text>
      <text class="chiral-component-label" x="66" y="455">L</text>
      <path class="chiral-component-wave-r" data-wave="r"/>
      <path class="chiral-component-wave-l" data-wave="l"/>
      <circle class="chiral-phase-dot-r" data-dot="r" r="6"/>
      <circle class="chiral-phase-dot-l" data-dot="l" r="6"/>
    </g>

    <g class="chiral-mode" data-mode="minus" data-phase-sign="-1">
      <rect class="chiral-mode-panel" x="432" y="360" width="348" height="112" rx="8"/>
      <text class="chiral-mode-title" x="452" y="388">out of phase at p = 0</text>
      <text class="chiral-mode-formula" x="642" y="388">&#936;&#8331; = (R-L)/&#8730;2</text>
      <line class="chiral-lane" x1="492" y1="418" x2="744" y2="418"/>
      <line class="chiral-lane" x1="492" y1="450" x2="744" y2="450"/>
      <text class="chiral-component-label" x="458" y="423">R</text>
      <text class="chiral-component-label" x="458" y="455">L</text>
      <path class="chiral-component-wave-r" data-wave="r"/>
      <path class="chiral-component-wave-l" data-wave="l"/>
      <circle class="chiral-phase-dot-r" data-dot="r" r="6"/>
      <circle class="chiral-phase-dot-l" data-dot="l" r="6"/>
    </g>
  </svg>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  const roots = document.querySelectorAll(".chiral-waves-mass-gap-animation:not([data-chiral-ready])");

  function pathFromPoints(points) {
    return points.map((point, index) => `${index === 0 ? "M" : "L"} ${point.x.toFixed(2)} ${point.y.toFixed(2)}`).join(" ");
  }

  function makeDispersionMapper() {
    const left = 82;
    const right = 742;
    const centerY = 190;
    const pMax = 3.25;
    const omegaMax = 3.25;
    const xScale = (right - left) / (2 * pMax);
    const yScale = 70;

    return {
      x: (p) => (left + right) / 2 + p * xScale,
      y: (omega) => centerY - omega * yScale,
      pMax,
      omegaMax
    };
  }

  function drawDispersion(root) {
    const mapper = makeDispersionMapper();
    const mass = Number(root.querySelector(".chiral-dispersion").dataset.mass || 1);
    const samples = 140;
    const positiveMassless = [];
    const negativeMassless = [];
    const positiveMassive = [];
    const negativeMassive = [];

    for (let i = 0; i <= samples; i += 1) {
      const p = -mapper.pMax + (2 * mapper.pMax * i) / samples;
      const omega = Math.sqrt(p * p + mass * mass);
      positiveMassless.push({ x: mapper.x(p), y: mapper.y(p) });
      negativeMassless.push({ x: mapper.x(p), y: mapper.y(-p) });
      positiveMassive.push({ x: mapper.x(p), y: mapper.y(omega) });
      negativeMassive.push({ x: mapper.x(p), y: mapper.y(-omega) });
    }

    root.querySelector('[data-path="massless-positive"]').setAttribute("d", pathFromPoints(positiveMassless));
    root.querySelector('[data-path="massless-negative"]').setAttribute("d", pathFromPoints(negativeMassless));
    root.querySelector('[data-path="massive-positive"]').setAttribute("d", pathFromPoints(positiveMassive));
    root.querySelector('[data-path="massive-negative"]').setAttribute("d", pathFromPoints(negativeMassive));
  }

  function wavePath(x0, x1, baseY, amplitude, phase, sign) {
    const points = [];
    const samples = 60;
    const width = x1 - x0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= samples; i += 1) {
      const u = i / samples;
      const envelope = Math.sin(Math.PI * u);
      const wave = Math.sin(2 * Math.PI * u);
      const y = baseY - sign * amplitude * Math.cos(phase) * envelope * wave;
      points.push({ x: x0 + width * u, y });
    }

    return pathFromPoints(points);
  }

  function updateModes(root, t) {
    const phase = 1.55 * t;
    root.querySelectorAll(".chiral-mode").forEach((mode) => {
      const sign = Number(mode.dataset.phaseSign || 1);
      const x0 = mode.dataset.mode === "plus" ? 100 : 492;
      const x1 = mode.dataset.mode === "plus" ? 352 : 744;
      const rBase = 418;
      const lBase = 450;
      const amp = 15;
      const rValue = Math.cos(phase);
      const lValue = sign * Math.cos(phase);

      mode.querySelector('[data-wave="r"]').setAttribute("d", wavePath(x0, x1, rBase, amp, phase, 1));
      mode.querySelector('[data-wave="l"]').setAttribute("d", wavePath(x0, x1, lBase, amp, phase, sign));
      mode.querySelector('[data-dot="r"]').setAttribute("cx", (x0 + x1) / 2);
      mode.querySelector('[data-dot="r"]').setAttribute("cy", rBase - amp * rValue);
      mode.querySelector('[data-dot="l"]').setAttribute("cx", (x0 + x1) / 2);
      mode.querySelector('[data-dot="l"]').setAttribute("cy", lBase - amp * lValue);
    });
  }

  function updateBranchDots(root, t) {
    const mapper = makeDispersionMapper();
    const mass = Number(root.querySelector(".chiral-dispersion").dataset.mass || 1);
    const p = 2.75 * Math.sin(0.65 * t);
    const omega = Math.sqrt(p * p + mass * mass);
    const positive = root.querySelector('[data-dot="positive"]');
    const negative = root.querySelector('[data-dot="negative"]');

    positive.setAttribute("cx", mapper.x(p).toFixed(2));
    positive.setAttribute("cy", mapper.y(omega).toFixed(2));
    negative.setAttribute("cx", mapper.x(p).toFixed(2));
    negative.setAttribute("cy", mapper.y(-omega).toFixed(2));
  }

  function animate(root, startTime) {
    const tick = (now) => {
      const t = (now - startTime) / 1000;
      updateBranchDots(root, t);
      updateModes(root, t);
      window.requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    };
    tick(startTime);
  }

  roots.forEach((root) => {
    root.dataset.chiralReady = "true";
    drawDispersion(root);
    animate(root, performance.now());
  });
})();
</script>
```
